text: "God tempted Abraham."... God tempteth no man to evil, (Jas. 1:13);  But by trial and experiment maketh known to the world and to ourselves what we are; as here by this trial the singular faith and obedience of Abraham was made manifest.

"Let us call the maid, and ask her will"... Not as to her marriage, as she had already 
consented, but of her quitting her parents and going to her husband.
